query_normalized: developing new methods to synthesize high-performance membranes using sustainable materials chemistry
rationale: The paper focuses on high-level resource strategy, supply risk assessment, and criticality indicators for raw materials (specifically hexagonal manganite), rather than the chemical synthesis methods or performance optimization of sustainable membranes requested by the user. It fails to meet criteria (a) or (b) as it does not measure membrane synthesis mechanisms, material properties, or performance metrics, and it is not a foundational methodology paper (d) for membrane chemistry.
